title: Marketplace Manager - Bewakoof Consulting Pvt Ltd - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Bewakoof Consulting Pvt Ltd - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
Bewakoof Consulting Pvt Ltd invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Marketplace Manager at our Navi Mumbai location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Bewakoof Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Bewakoof Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bewakoof Consulting Pvt Ltd!
